title: Time Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger time design foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Time Design Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Time Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good time design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Time Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
